creator: dufresnep@zoho.com
text:
Current version of geoclue (2.5.7 use libsoup (v.2).
This cause programs not to load: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=269703
Also: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=269434

https://gitlab.freedesktop.org/geoclue/geoclue/-/tags/2.7.0 says:
HTTP requests are now made via libsoup3.0 instead of libsoup2.4,

So I would expect upgrading would allows a few Gnome programs to start.
